name: duyet-claude-plugins
description: A collection of production-quality plugins for Claude Code including autonomous agents, workflow automation, and developer tools.

plugins.name: team-agents
plugins.description: Leader, Senior Engineer, and Junior Engineer agents for coordinated parallel task execution

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Create a Git commit with semantic commit message format and PR workflow with templates

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces avoiding AI slop aesthetics

plugins.name: interview
plugins.description: Conduct in-depth requirements interviews using Socratic questioning

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Configurable status bar showing context usage, API rate limits, git branch, and active tools

plugins.name: orchestration
plugins.description: Orchestrator skill for managing parallel agent workstreams

plugins.name: duyetbot
plugins.description: Pragmatic software development companion with engineering discipline

plugins.name: docs-generator
plugins.description: Automatically generate and maintain plugin documentation

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub operations using gh CLI - PRs, issues, workflows, batch operations, PR babysitting with AI review bot integration, and smart branch detection

plugins.name: fix
plugins.description: Fix issues, tests, and CI failures with intelligent problem detection

plugins.name: simplify
plugins.description: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then simplify issues found

plugins.name: clickhouse
plugins.description: Comprehensive ClickHouse knowledge base from Altinity KB + official docs

plugins.name: prompt-engineering
plugins.description: Prompt engineering techniques for Grok, Claude, and Gemini LLMs

plugins.name: clickhouse-monitoring
plugins.description: Agent Skill for the ClickHouse Monitor dashboard - a real-time monitoring and observability tool for ClickHouse clusters

plugins.name: unsloth-training
plugins.description: Fine-tune LLMs with Unsloth using GRPO or SFT. Dataset prep, synthetic data, environment flags, MLX (Apple Silicon), FP8, vision, mobile export, GGUF.

plugins.name: good-html
plugins.description: Generate or review high-density, interactive, self-contained HTML artifacts based on Thariq Shihipar's patterns.

plugins.name: anyrouter
plugins.description: Wire AnyRouter into coding agents. Universal OpenAI-compatible LLM gateway for 150+ models, migration recipes from Anthropic/OpenAI/OpenRouter, and a remote MCP server for keys and credits.

plugins.name: sag-notify
plugins.description: Spoken voice notifications via sag (ElevenLabs TTS): skill-driven, Claude calls sag directly to speak a short alert just before it asks you something and a one-line summary when work finishes, naming the project. Configurable voice and language.

plugins.name: build-macos-apps
plugins.description: Build, debug, instrument, and implement macOS apps with SwiftUI and AppKit guidance, codesigning, packaging, and telemetry workflows.

plugins.name: build-ios-apps
plugins.description: Build, profile, debug, and refine iOS apps with SwiftUI and Xcode workflows including App Intents, Simulator debugging, performance profiling, and memory leak detection.

plugins.name: agent-loop
plugins.description: Continuous agent loop for overnight/day repository maintenance. Orchestrates triage, autoreview, browser automation, and parallel agent work across threads. Wake every 5 min, direct work, land autonomously.

plugins.name: kb
plugins.description: Knowledge base maintenance skills. Consolidate, dedupe, prune, refresh, and forget notes in a markdown KB.

plugins.name: okf
plugins.description: Open Knowledge Format (OKF) tooling. Author, initialize, validate, and refactor knowledge into vendor-neutral OKF v0.1 bundles: markdown files with YAML frontmatter.
